ddls:
CREATE TABLE "space_objects" (
  "norad_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each space object */,
  "real_name" TEXT /* Name of the space object */,
  "epoch" TEXT /* Time reference for the orbit data */,
  "mean_motion" REAL /* Average angular motion of the object */,
  "eccentricity" REAL /* Measure of how elliptical the orbit is */,
  "inclination" REAL /* Angle between the orbital plane and the reference plane */,
  "ra_of_asc_node" REAL /* Angle from the reference direction to the ascending node */,
  "arg_of_pericenter" REAL /* Angle from the ascending node to the pericenter */,
  "mean_anomaly" REAL /* Angle from the pericenter to the space object's current position */,
  "semimajor_axis" REAL /* Average distance from the center of the orbit to the space object */,
  "period" REAL /* Time it takes for one complete orbit */,
  "apogee" REAL /* Farthest point from the center of the orbit */,
  "perigee" REAL /* Closest point from the center of the orbit */,
  "orbital_status" TEXT /* Status of the space object's orbit (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "classification" TEXT /* Classification of the space object (e.g., satellite, debris) */,
  "launch_date" TEXT /* Date the space object was launched */,
  "decay_date" TEXT /* Date the space object decayed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("norad_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the sensor */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., radar, optical) */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the sensor measurements */,
  "resolution" REAL /* Resolution of the sensor */,
  "sensitivity" REAL /* Sensitivity of the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observations" (
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation */,
  "norad_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observed space object */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that made the observation */,
  "observation_time" TEXT /* Time when the observation was made */,
  "data" TEXT /* Raw data from the observation */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., good, bad) */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_norad_id FOREIGN KEY ("norad_id") REFERENCES space_objects ("norad_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orbit_data" (
  "orbit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each orbit data entry */,
  "norad_id" INTEGER /* ID of the space object */,
  "epoch" TEXT /* Time reference for the orbit data */,
  "mean_motion" REAL /* Average angular motion of the object */,
  "eccentricity" REAL /* Measure of how elliptical the orbit is */,
  "inclination" REAL /* Angle between the orbital plane and the reference plane */,
  "ra_of_asc_node" REAL /* Angle from the reference direction to the ascending node */,
  "arg_of_pericenter" REAL /* Angle from the ascending node to the pericenter */,
  "mean_anomaly" REAL /* Angle from the pericenter to the space object's current position */,
  "semimajor_axis" REAL /* Average distance from the center of the orbit to the space object */,
  "period" REAL /* Time it takes for one complete orbit */,
  "apogee" REAL /* Farthest point from the center of the orbit */,
  "perigee" REAL /* Closest point from the center of the orbit */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date the prediction was made */,
  "prediction_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("orbit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orbit_data_norad_id FOREIGN KEY ("norad_id") REFERENCES space_objects ("norad_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., scientist, engineer, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "norad_id" INTEGER /* ID of the space object accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "data_requested" TEXT /* Specific data requested (e.g., orbit data, sensor data) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_norad_id FOREIGN KEY ("norad_id") REFERENCES space_objects ("norad_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collisions" (
  "collision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each predicted collision */,
  "norad_id_a" INTEGER /* ID of the first space object involved in the collision */,
  "norad_id_b" INTEGER /* ID of the second space object involved in the collision */,
  "predicted_time" TEXT /* Predicted time of the collision */,
  "probability" REAL /* Probability of the collision occurring */,
  "conjunction_distance" REAL /* Distance between the two objects at the predicted conjunction */,
  "conjunction_velocity" REAL /* Relative velocity between the two objects at the predicted conjunction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collisions_norad_id_b FOREIGN KEY ("norad_id_b") REFERENCES space_objects ("norad_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collisions_norad_id_a FOREIGN KEY ("norad_id_a") REFERENCES space_objects ("norad_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "missions" (
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mission */,
  "mission_name" TEXT /* Name of the mission */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the mission */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the mission */,
  "objective" TEXT /* Objective of the mission */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the mission */,
  "space_agency" TEXT /* Space agency responsible for the mission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "object_missions" (
  "object_mission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association between a space object and a mission */,
  "norad_id" INTEGER /* ID of the space object */,
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mission */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the space object in the mission (e.g., primary, secondary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("object_mission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_missions_norad_id FOREIGN KEY ("norad_id") REFERENCES space_objects ("norad_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_missions_mission_id FOREIGN KEY ("mission_id") REFERENCES missions ("mission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "norad_id" INTEGER /* ID of the space object the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_time" TEXT /* Time the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of data in the file (e.g., orbit data, sensor data) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_norad_id FOREIGN KEY ("norad_id") REFERENCES space_objects ("norad_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event triggering the notification (e.g., collision, launch) */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "message" TEXT /* Notification message */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
